_comment_MD013: line-length: long URLs and tables common in API/reference docs
_comment_MD024: no-duplicate-heading: section titles like 'Example' recur across API docs
_comment_MD030: list-marker-space: MkDocs Material grid cards require 3-space indent after '-'
_comment_MD033: no-inline-html: we use MkDocs Material admonitions/tabs and inline HTML callouts
_comment_MD036: no-emphasis-as-heading: intentional use of bold labels inside admonition panels
_comment_MD041: first-line-heading: docs start with MkDocs frontmatter, not an H1
_comment_MD046: code-block-style: MkDocs Material tabbed content requires indented prose that markdownlint misreads as code
